mapper.select: /* adm-master-calendar-sql-oracle-xml - selectPkCalendar */ SELECT CFULLDATE ,CYEAR ,CMONTH ,CDATE ,DAYWEEK ,DAYTITLE ,ISBASICHOLIDAY ,ISEXTRAHOLIDAY ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_CAL WHERE CFULLDATE = SUBSTR(#{cfulldate} , 1, 8)
/* adm-master-calendar-sql-oracle-xml - selectDupCalendar */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_CAL WHERE CFULLDATE = SUBSTR(#{cfulldate} , 1, 8)
